message:
chore(beads): saturation-state note on 2ot4f

Additional scans confirmed gossip zone_states (local-only),

Vec::with_capacity usage (all locally-bounded) are clean. All
SunnyMoose patches still intact; rustfmt clean after the
earlier style commit.
